programme.desc: Jack Ryan must quickly evolve from soldier to analyst to full-fledged operative to stop a devastating terrorist plot against the United States.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: The Return
programme.desc: The "universal soldiers" must fight the whole army, when the military's supercomputer S.E.T.H gets out of control.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: Jack Ryan must quickly evolve from soldier to analyst to full-fledged operative to stop a devastating terrorist plot against the United States.

programme.title: Get the Gringo
programme.desc: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison, where he learns to survive with the help of a young boy.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: Jack Ryan must quickly evolve from soldier to analyst to full-fledged operative to stop a devastating terrorist plot against the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Solar System: The Secrets of the Universe
programme.desc: Join our host on the International Space Station of the year 2050. Marvel at the three-dimensional sights and learn many things about the astral bodies that surround us.

programme.title: Science of the Soul
programme.desc: Do human beings have souls? From the beginning of human awareness – no matter the context and no matter the age – the answer was always \"yes\". All cultures have universally argued that human beings are \"ensouled\".

programme.title: Einstein's Universe
programme.desc: A fascinating exploration of Einstein's theory of relativity told by narrator actor Peter Ustinov, and a cadre of preeminent scientists. Produced on the centennial of Einstein’s birth in 1979 by WGBH and BBC, based on Nigel Calder’s titular book.

programme.title: Into the Cosmos: The Space Race, Mars and Beyond
programme.desc: Detailed accounts of previous missions for the exploration of Mars, including the landing of the rovers on the planets surface.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers
programme.desc: The Burj Dubai holds the title as the tallest man-made structure ever built, pushing the technological envelope. Near India's capital Delhi, the Qutub Minar reigns supreme for almost a thousand years as the world's tallest brick minaret.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers
programme.desc: On an island the size of Singapore, water scarcity is a dire issue. The solution is the construction of an urban reservoir, the first of its kind in the world. Together with cutting-edge technology, Singapore is on its way to water sufficiency.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Tankers are the workhorses of our modern economy and the largest of these are built in Korea. Features like double-hulls and multiple tanks have pushed the cargo and safety capacity of tankers to new heights, making them the mainstay of the oil industry.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 4
programme.desc: For years, the roads of Mumbai were a hotbed of congestion and overcrowding. Now, a dynamic link road promises to ease the city's traffic woes, but the construction of Mumbai's first double-tiered flyover has been anything but easy.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 5
programme.desc: The largest airport terminal in the world in Beijing is an engineering marvel that nonetheless pays strict adherence to the principles of Chinese Feng shui, and marks a new footnote in an age-old tradition of building big.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 6
programme.desc: It is the world's deepest immersed Tunnel, the Marmaray Project promises to ease Istanbul's decades-old traffic woes. Located in an earthquake zone, it is an engineering feat that is only rivaled by the discovery of a nearby ancient port.

programme.title: Engineering Ground Breakers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Self-declared 8th Wonder of the World, the Palm trilogy is the largest man-made island chain in the world. Employing technology like satellite positioning, the Palm trilogy has broken new records and engineering milestones.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Temples, designed to honor the Gods, have been at the heart of cities since earliest times.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: How gold is mined and transformed into everyday objects like jewelry and currency.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Throughout history, ancestors have always strived to go higher, bigger, deeper, further.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Examining the history of the Great Wall of China.

programme.title: The To Do List
programme.desc: Valedictorian, Brandy wants to get "educated" before college, so she assembles a list of all the sexual activities she missed out on. Quickly realizing that she's way out of her league, Brandy solicits her sister and burn-out boss for their help.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Jawbreaker
programme.desc: "The beautiful ones. The flawless four. Everyone wanted to be them. You know 'em". First there's Courtney "Satan-in-heels" Shayne and her pawn, the dense but dangerous Marcie Fox, a legend in her own little mind. Rated: R

programme.title: Postcards from the Edge
programme.desc: Meryl Streep, Shirley MacLaine, Gene Hackman, Dennis Quaid and Richard Dreyfuss star in Mike Nichols' hilarious blockbuster film about a very real mother-daughter relationship set against the backdrop of today's Hollywood. Rated: R

programme.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
programme.desc: When an unusual ad inspires three cynical Seattle magazine employees to look for the story behind it, they discover a mysterious eccentric named Kenneth, a likable but paranoid supermarket clerk, who believes he's solved the riddle of time travel.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A driven high school senior with political aspirations falls in love with the seemingly perfect girl-next-door, only to discover that she's a porn star.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: In her Academy Award winning role, Cher, while waiting for her timid fiance to decide between her and his mother, falls in love with her fiance's estranged brother, a bakery worker with a love of opera and life.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Last year at this time, Jake and Kristi were two crazy single kids in love. Now they're two crazy married adults in transition.

programme.title: Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Two of today's hottest young actors, Christian Slater and Marisa Tomei, star in this tender romance about lonely souls destined to find one another. Co-starring Rosie Perez.

programme.title: Autumn in New York
programme.desc: Autumn in New York follows the sexual exploits of Will Keane (RICHARD GERE) until he runs into an unexpected dead end when he meets Charlotte Fielding (WINONA RYDER). Charlotte is half Will's age and twice his match.

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic drama about two misfits who come together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.sub-title: Bonito con cebolla roja y mojo de Espelette

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Este plato combina la suavidad y versatilidad de los canelones con el sabor delicado del pollo, creando una versión ligera y moderna de un clásico de la cocina italiana.
programme.sub-title: Canelones de pollo con aguacate aderezado

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: El gallo, un pescado blanco de carne firme y suave, se convierte en el protagonista de esta receta, que combina lo mejor de la cocina tradicional con un toque moderno.
programme.sub-title: Gallo con crema de ajo y refrito

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: El plato se acompaña de un salteado de vainas (una variedad de guisantes o judías verdes) que aportan frescura y un toque crujiente, equilibrando perfectamente la suavidad del marisco.
programme.sub-title: Sabirones fritos con salteado de vainas y jamon

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: La carne de cordero, uno de los ingredientes más tradicionales y apreciados de la cocina española, es el protagonista de este plato.
programme.sub-title: Carre de cordero con cereales crujientes

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Este arroz marinero es una receta que fusiona lo mejor de la cocina costera, con ingredientes frescos del mar que aportan un sabor intenso y delicioso.
programme.sub-title: Arroz marinero de bacalao con mejillones

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Este pastel, que combina lo mejor de las verduras con el sabor intenso del bacon, es una opción perfecta para aquellos que buscan una comida sabrosa y fácil de preparar.

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Este plato combina la suavidad y ternura del pollo con el toque especial de la cerveza, creando una terrina de sabor profundo y muy original.

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Este plato juega con la combinación de sabores intensos y texturas contrastadas, haciendo que el tomate verde, un ingrediente poco común en muchas recetas, se convierta en el protagonista de una preparación sabrosa y sorprendente.
programme.sub-title: Tomates verdes fritos con migas de bonito

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: La paella, uno de los platos más emblemáticos de la gastronomía española, se reinventa en este episodio con el uso de Puntalette, una variedad de pasta corta que, en lugar de arroz, se convierte en la base perfecta para esta "paella de pasta".
programme.sub-title: Paella De Puntalette Con Karrakelas Y Berberechos

programme.title: A Bocados
programme.desc: Este pescado, conocido por su carne tierna y suave, se cocina con sencillez para resaltar su sabor natural, obteniendo un resultado jugoso y lleno de frescura.
programme.sub-title: Pescado muxu martin conpatata duquesa y verduras salteadas

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: "The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Sebastian's prepara comida congelada de un menú complejo y los meseros están más preocupados por las audiciones para sus papeles de actuación que por servir las comidas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a hot summer's day, life doesn't get much better than a big, juicy, smoky slab of spicy, mouth-watering ribs. Our goal was to produce flavorful, juicy, tender ribs that would be well worth the time, money, and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's the best way to enjoy summer tomatoes? While it's hard to argue with sliced, salted tomatoes, there are times when you want to use tomatoes in more elaborate dishes, and gazpacho and a cheesy tart are two of our favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia shows Bridget how to make a regional favorite, Southern Style Smothered Chicken. Then, Adam reveals the best Kitchen Timer on the market. Finally, Bridget reveals the secrets to a show-stopping Apple Pandowdy.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia unveils the secrets to the ultimate Barbecue Chicken Thighs to host, Bridget. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of popcorn. And finally, Bryan demonstrates how to make Fried Peach Pies at home.
programme.sub-title: BBQ Thighs and Fried Peach Pies

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget shares steps to achieving perfect Memphis-style Wet Ribs in the Slow Cooker. Next, Jack challenges Julia to an apple-cider vinegar tasting. And finally, Ashley teaches Bridget how to make the leftover favorite, Mashed Potato Cakes from scratch.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia fires up the grill for Bridget, demonstrating the ultimate Grilled Bourbon Steak. Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of Dill Pickles. Then, Ashley prepares Grilled Broccoli with Lemon and Parmesan. Finally, Adam reviews Instant-Read Thermometers.
programme.sub-title: Bourbon and Broccoli Hit the Grill

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia reveals the secrets to making Citrus-Braised Pork Tacos. Then, Jack challenges Julia to a Mild Salsa taste test. Next, Christie shows Julia how to achieve unforgettable Churros right at home. Finally, Adam shares his favorite piping bag.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan teaches Julia how to make the perfect South Carolina Smoked Fresh Ham. Then, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of Spiral Sliced Hams. Adam reveals his pick for potato mashers. Finally, Christie shares a Smashed Potato Salad recipe with Bridget.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget shows Julia how to achieve restaurant-worthy homemade pizza, made in a cast iron skillet. Next, Adam reviews his top choice for Cast Iron Skillets. Finally, Ashley teaches Bridget how to make a show-stopping Chocolate Chip Skillet Cookie.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget shows Julia the steps to preparing the Central California regional favorite, Garlic Fried Chicken. Next, Adam shares his pick for the best inexpensive Dutch oven on the market. And finally, Ashley prepares Crispy Parmesan Potatoes.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia cooks her favorite beef chili with black beans and chipotle, easy baked white rice, and watermelon-lime agua fresca.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes crispy pan-fried pork chops, roasted butternut squash salad with za'atar and parsley, and a super-simple spinach salad.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia celebrates with an indoor clambake made with fresh lobster, mussels, and clams, and served with honey cornbread and bistro slaw.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: It's burger night in the Davison house and Julia's got all the fixings: home ground beef, crispy homefries, and her all-time favorite condiment, homemade pickled onions.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for an easy, one-pan bratwurst dinner with tender kale and potato salad and skillet-roasted pears with caramel sauce for dessert.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes tender beef kebabs on the grill with a cherry tomato, arugula and potato salad and summery berry gratins with malted whipped cream

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia fires up the grill for her favorite summertime dinner: grill-roasted chickens, Israeli couscous, fresh zuchini and tomato tian, and chilled lemon souffles for dessert

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes gas-grilled shrimp skewers with lemon-garlic sauce, a tangy farro salad with white beans and snap peas, plus homemade strawberry frozen yogurt and chocolate shell topping.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tomatoes and pasta are a classic (and delicious) pairing, but sometimes you want a change. Vegetable sauces, like the two featured in this episode—one with mushrooms and one with broccoli rabe—are appealing options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork producers have worked so hard to remove fat from their pigs that most pork roasts have little character. Glazing a pork roast with maple syrup is an attractive way to boost flavor and we wanted to perfect this recipe.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Truckers often know where to find the best home-style cooking. And what could be better than chicken-fried steak with cream gravy and real coconut cream pie?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: River's Edge
programme.desc: The lives of a group of teenagers are thrown into a moral spin when one murders his girlfriend. Faced with the brutal reality of death, each must decide whether to turn their friend in to the police.

programme.title: Rolling Thunder
programme.desc: William Devane and Tommy Lee Jones star as two former P.O.W.s out for revenge in this neo-noir action-thriller that Quentin Tarantino cites as one of his favorite films. Written by genre masters Paul Schrader and Heywood Gould. John Flynn directs.

programme.title: Filly Brown
programme.desc: A promising hip-hop rhymer from Los Angeles finds herself in a gray area when a record producer offers her a compromising shot at stardom.

programme.title: Guys and Dolls
programme.desc: In New York, a gambler is challenged to take a cold female missionary to Havana, but they fall for each other, and the bet has a hidden motive to finance a crap game.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers, and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises, and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: How To Succeed In Business Without Really Trying
programme.desc: This hilarious musical stars Robert Morse as a charming and scheming window washer who climbs to the top of the corporate ladder by way of a self-help book.

programme.title: Hair
programme.desc: A country boy and Vietnam draftee embark on an adventure of a lifetime when he meets a group of counterculture hippies and his eyes are opened to the darker side of class, race, and big city life in this adaptation of the Broadway sensation.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street
programme.desc: Depp stars in the title role as a man unjustly sent to prison who vows revenge, not only for his punishment, but for the devastating consequences that happened to his wife and daughter.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his team join BBC Children in Need on a truly challenging build for the Blackburn homeless charity, Nightsafe, as young homeless people are often overlooked, vulnerable and very much in need of help.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Help for amateur do-it-yourselfers.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team tackle a big build for triplet daughters in Barnstable.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team help the McCreight family in Bangor, Northern Ireland.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Help for amateur do-it-yourselfers.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team issue a call to arms and recruit friends, family and local trades to put in their best efforts to help transform the homes and lives of families across Britain.
programme.sub-title: Children in Need Special 2020: Caswell Bay

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team issue a call to arms and recruit friends, family and local trades to put in their best efforts to help transform the homes and lives of families across Britain.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Lindsey hopes to get a major extension finished following her husband's tragic death.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil Spencer is going undercover as a secret agent to help the frustrated house sellers across the country; he is facing a tough mission on the Mersey, trying to shift a family home suffering from dodgy décor and a problem pooch.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil Spencer takes on a Sicilian style home in Bath, England, with sellers who don't seem to be listening.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil Spencer is undercover on one of his toughest missions yet: tackling a home stuck in the last century and on the market, but with no front door.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil Spencer is in the East Midlands of England; he tries to beat a dodgy DIY with sticky stains to get a sale in two weeks.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil Spencer goes undercover in Newcastle, helping former cabbie Allan shift his shabby semi; since his wife passed away, Allan's love for the house has waned; it's just him, his two sons and grandson living there and it shows.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Phil Spencer faces a massive challenge trying to sell a problem property that's overrun with dogs and décor.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein's long weekends across Europe come to a conclusion in the city of Palermo.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc creates four mouth-watering chocolate recipes: a simple mousse, rich chocolate delice, fondant with a melting middle, and his signature dessert: cafe creme, which is a chocolate-sculpted cup filled with a mousse and coffee sabayon.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond dives into the world of fish with the underused and affordable mackerel; he creates a light meal of grilled mackerel with a soy lime dressing.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc looks to the UK's favorite fruit, apples, for inspiration; he returns to memories of childhood with a simple tart made with a foolproof pastry and custard filling.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella introduces her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds, and a mid-week family feast of tagliata.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella Lawson shares the secrets of her Italian roast chicken, served alongside a saffron orzotto; Nigella prepares coffee ice cream for dessert, inspired by the ice cream parlors of Florence; a chocolate olive oil cake provides an extra treat.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Pork loin stuffed with Parma ham and oregano, served alongside her speedy mock mash and lazy person's vignarola.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Liquorice pudding; Sardinian sun-dried and toasted couscous; butterflied leg of lamb; baby aubergines with oregano and roasted red onion.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Lamb chops with mint; chilli and golden potatoes; ruby red plum and amoretti crumble; farro risotto with mushrooms.

programme.title: Sky Safari

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Chaos 2 enters the competition, and unveils a spectacular new method to catapult itself back onto its wheels.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Jurassic Park team is among those making their debut in this round.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More metal-mangling chaos as radio-controlled machines face each other and the awesome house robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The winning Roadblock team from the First Wars returns with a new robot, the Beast of Bodmin.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More metal-grinding mayhem, including a robot built for a fiver taking on the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Reigning champion Panic Attack returns to defend its title against its rivals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Atlas and Evil Weavil are two of the remote-controlled robots in metal-grinding action.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: After his robot Cassius was eliminated from last year's finals, designer Rex Garrod returns to the metal-mangling fray with the remote-controlled successor - Cassius II.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Killerhurtz returns to the arena to face Cereberus in more metal-grinding action.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Firestorm whips up a fury and the unpredictable Nemesis boys from Dublin return with a brand new robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight more robots battle to win the last available place in the semi-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first round of the semi-finals, which features reigning champion Panic Attack defending its title and Chaos 2 trying to live up to its name.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Round two of the semi-finals, in which first series winner Beast of Bodmin competes to retain the title.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The four robots left standing fight it out in the Grand Final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The fourth heat features an experienced roboteer fighting to secure his legacy, a new wave spinner and a powerful crusher. Competing through group battles for a place in the final are Iron-Awe 6, The Kegs, Tauron, Nuts 2, Concussion and Androne 4000.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This round determines which of the fighting machines makes it into the grand final, along with the final two robots to compete in the Ten Robot Rumble. Thor, Coyote, Expulsion, Hobgoblin, Push to Exit and Magnetar battle it out.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The illustrious grand final begins with the biggest battle in Robot Wars history. The second and third place robots from the heats will battle it out in a fight to the death to determine who will be the 6th and final robot in the grand final.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Creamed coconut spinach; eggplant with herbs and yogurt; cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas; za'atar smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Chicken kabsa; stuffed cabbage and spiced lamb chops; orzo risotto with wild mushrooms; a sweet cake called kumajj.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Chicken machbous; mansaf; beef biryani; lamb ghouzi.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Grilled pomegranate skirt steak kebabs; lamb kebabs with yogurt-mint sauce; beef, mushroom and millet kebabs; saffron-yogurt chicken kebabs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Pomegranate skirt steak kebabs; lamb kebabs with yogurt-mint sauce; beef, mushroom and millet kebabs; saffron-yogurt chicken kebabs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Creamed coconut spinach; eggplant with herbs and yogurt; cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas; za'atar smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha shows how to properly move an established tree on her very own Christmas tree farm; she gives a tour of her pinetum where she teaches about new and unusual conifer trees.
programme.sub-title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha brings the outdoors inside the home and shares her love of houseplants; she shows how to take care of the most popular houseplants and how to propagate them to create new plants.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha explores how to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha takes us inside her vegetable greenhouse to see how she has turned her harvest into a year-round bounty; she collects, stores, and sows seeds, and makes her perfect green drink.
programme.sub-title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse; Seed Starting

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha shares techniques for making the perfect burgers; Pat LaFrieda joins Martha to grind his beef mix; Thomas Joseph joins to make a hake fish burger and Martha shares her turkey burger.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha is throwing a very special BBQ called Asado; plus Martha prepares a chimichurri sauce, her daughter Alexis's chopped salad and for dessert, fruit flavored popsicles; a perfect celebration.
programme.sub-title: Martha Throws an Argentine Asado BBQ

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: One of Martha's favorite things to do is to make jam with the perfectly ripened fruit and berries grown on her Bedford farm; Martha shares her favorite recipes, as well as jam and jarring techniques.
programme.sub-title: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Meet Martha in one of her favorite places on the farm - the chicken coop to talk about one of her favorite things to eat - eggs; Martha will share her top methods for making an egg-cellent breakfast.
programme.sub-title: How to Properly Cook an Egg

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living

programme.sub-title: Tuna Salad 101; Shell Project; James David Gardens Stonework

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living
programme.desc: Easy pepper pasta sauce; antique celestial globes and star cards; a California cherry orchard; poached cherries with ricotta cheese; dressed-up storage boxes.
programme.sub-title: Pepper Pasta; C.J. Olson Cherries; Poached Cherries

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living

programme.sub-title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: From a pan seared steak with bordelaise sauce to a classic sizzling steak fired up on the grill, Martha makes steak dinners cooked to perfection with the help of her Head of Culinary at the farm.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty french dish of root vegetables and various cuts of meat, all braised in a savory broth; It's served with sliced meat, vegetables and delicious accompaniments!
programme.sub-title: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha creates the perfect menu for a paella party that will have your guests coming back for seconds; her paella is served with gazpacho and her incredible sangria.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Janie Glade inspires a delicious and economical meal.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril shares how to make the perfect burger. Home-ground buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese and fresh thyme; turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Short Ribs braised with coffee and ancho chiles served with creamy parmesan polenta.
programme.sub-title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril shows brides-to-be the correct cookware to use including a wok which is ideal to make a quick and easy stir fried squid with chili sauce. A cast iron skillet is used to prepare sirloin steak fajitas.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril cooks for a group of firefighters. He prepares sizzling red hot shrimp with rooster sauce over sticky rice, blazing hot brazed and barbecued pork shanks with a spicy New Mexican barbecue sauce served with a side of cheddar jalapeno cornbread.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: A salt crusted branzino seasoned with citrus; grilled calamari and seafood paella.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Chicken and smoked sausage gumbo, plus tips on how to make a roux.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: How to properly prepare oysters.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Emeril makes old barbecue favorites and throws in some twists.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Pan-fried flounder with dilled tartar sauce; citrus-crusted pompano with grapefruit butter; shrimp creole smothered puppy drum; Biloxi bacon.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Strawberry Daiquiri Ice Pops; Chocolate Cherry Ice Cream Bon Bons; Mango Frozen Yogurt and Raspberry Parfait; Dulce de Leche Ice Cream Cake.

programme.title: Essence of Emeril
programme.desc: Horseradish garlic burgers; tuna burgers; lamb burgers.

programme.title: Essence of Emeril
programme.desc: Whole fish emeril-style; paul's grilled redfish; chef dave's mayo method.

programme.desc: Crawfish remoulade; mint rice mustard; grilled lamb.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter of Café Reconcile, a non-profit that helps young people break into the food business, join Emeril to explore a menu inspired by their dishes.

programme.desc: Emeril visits with his friend and fellow chef Aaron Sanchez, and explores a menu inspired by their trip to Cuba.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Janie Glade inspires a delicious and economical meal.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Littleneck clams on the half shell with champagne caviar mignonette; cherrystone clams and pork in a saffron wine broth; Emeril's memory stovetop clam boil; Hilda's stuffies; grilled razor clams with meyer lemon and three herb vinaigrette.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Hearts of Palm and Stone Crab Salad; Caribbean Conch Chowder with Fritter; Grilled Florida Pompano with Sauteed Lobster Piccata; Mango Lime Cream Pies.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Fresh tomato and bean salsa; seafood ceviche tacos; Emeril's taco salad with roasted poblano buttermilk dressing; triple chocolate brownies with cinnamon cream cheese icing.

programme.title: Giovanni's Island [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: A dramatic yet heart-warming story of cross-cultural friendship among children in the aftermath of WWII, presented by Tokyo-based award-winning animation studio Production I.G. Based on true events.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: The Movie
programme.desc: A long time ago, a powerful spirit drove the world to the brink of destruction. Naruto's latest mission is to protect Shion, a priestess from the Land of Ogres, whom the spirit is after.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Bonds
programme.desc: Mysterious flying ninja have launched a sudden attack against the Leaf. To save their village, Naruto and his friends set out to stop this new threat.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Will of Fire
programme.desc: Four Kekkei Genkai shinobi who have been guarding the Cloud, Stone, Mist and Sand disappear without a trace. At the same time, Naruto discovers that Kakashi has left the village.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: The Lost Tower
programme.desc: The Rogue Ninja Mukade is about to be caught by Naruto, when he summons the power of an ancient underground channel of chakra. Naruto gets caught up in the chakra and is sent back in time.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Blood Prison
programme.desc: Naruto's battle to reclaim his honor begins! Naruto is convicted of a serious crime he didn't commit and is sent to the inescapable prison, Hozuki Castle.

programme.title: Road to Ninja : Naruto the Movie
programme.desc: Naruto and his friends succeed in driving away the infamous Akatsuki, who have mysteriously returned from the dead, but afterwards, a strange masked figure appears before him!

programme.title: The Last: Naruto the Movie
programme.desc: The moon approaches dangerously close! Naruto, Sakura, Shikamaru, Sai and Hinata, sets out to investigate and comes upon a certain plan and its unbelievable mastermind lying in wait.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on the worldwide best-selling memoir starring Academy Award® winner Brie Larson and Academy Award® nominees Woody Harrelson and Naomi Watts, THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Moondance Alexander
programme.desc: When a Pinto pony named Checkers leaps into her life, Moondance is convinced that Checkers has champion potential and enters him in the Bow Valley Classic. She soon learns that only perseverance lands you in the winner's circle.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Classic story of a little Swiss girl, who after the death of her parents is sent to live with her goat herding grandfather (Max Von Sydow) in the high Alpine mountains.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: Starring Olivia Holt (Cloak & Dagger), Skyler Gisondon (Booksmart) and Bruce Dern (The Senator). Two high school outsiders join forces to overtake the local school board.

programme.title: Timber The Treasure Dog
programme.desc: A local villain is buying up all the ranches where 12-year-old Mickey and his family live, unless they can find a small fortune, they will lose theirs. Luckily, Mickeys dog Timber holds the clue to a legend of buried treasure.

programme.title: The Simple Life of Noah Dearborn
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Sidney Poitier and Dianne Wiest star with Mary-Louise Parker in this enchanting tale about a quiet hero who becomes the talk of the town.

programme.title: F.R.E.D.I.
programme.desc: Prepare for an adventure that's out of this world! When an intelligent, lovable robot, known as F.R.E.D.I., goes missing from a secret government research facility it's found by 15 year old James.

programme.title: The Adventurer: Curse of the Midas Box
programme.desc: Transporting you to a rambunctious realm of enchanting fantasy. When Mariah's little brother is kidnapped, he follows a trail of clues to discover a hidden realm of monsters, ancient secrets and a long-lost artefact. Feat: Michael Sheen & Sam Neill.

programme.title: Not to Forget
programme.desc: After a life of little scams, a self-centered millennial is sentenced to take care of his grandmother, who is affected by Alzheimer's. As he realizes the extent of her wealth, the protagonist gets closer to the treasure he's been looking for.

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: When Michael Kingley, a successful retired businessman starts to see images from his past that he can't explain, he's forced to remember his childhood and how, as a boy, he rescued and raised an extraordinary orphaned pelican, Mr Percival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Latitude
programme.desc: It's almost halfway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and the Gloucester fleet has hit a lull in fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle Royale
programme.desc: With the second half of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna fishing season now underway, competition amongst the Gloucester fleet intensifies when tuna become scarce.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Brotherly Shove
programme.desc: A new week calls for new techniques as the Gloucester Captains try unconventional methods to hook their next paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blue Grit
programme.desc: Time is running out in the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and, this week, every boat in the Gloucester fleet is facing a different challenge.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: First Blood
programme.desc: It's the first day of the new Bluefin tuna fishing season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and every captain in the fleet wants to the land the coveted first tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bluefin Beatdown
programme.desc: An old rivalry re- ignites after a fight at the dock between captains Tyler McLaughlin and Dave Carraro, of FV- tuna.com, while a crewmember fights to keep his job on the Hot Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and oneveteran Gloucester captain has yet to catch his first fish, while two rival harpoon boats go head to head.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Hard or Go Home
programme.desc: It's week five of Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fishing season, and when a sudden storm engulfs the fleet, each captain must decide if the risk of staying out on the water is worth the reward.

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.desc: Larry Madowo sits down with Nigerian-American star Rotimi and Tanzanian pop sensation Vanessa Mdee in their first-ever joint interview.

programme.title: Blueprint
programme.desc: An exploration of the changes the pandemic wrought on industries, cities and life.

programme.title: CNN This Morning Weekend
programme.desc: Stories from across the world and refreshing conversations with Boris Sanchez and Amara Walker.

programme.title: First of All With Victor Blackwell
programme.desc: Victor Blackwell brings a fresh perspective on the week's news with a focus on stories affecting communities of colour.

programme.title: Smerconish
programme.desc: Michael Smerconish tackles the American political news stories of the week, offering only one kind of talking points, his own.

programme.title: CNN Saturday Morning Table for Five
programme.desc: Join CNN Saturday Morning for an insightful and provocative discussion of the week's biggest stories.

programme.title: The Amanpour Hour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international anchor, brings valuable insight to the biggest global and domestic news stories of the week.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.title: Marketplace Middle East
programme.desc: Kurdistan, Iraq emerges as an economic powerhouse and tourism destination, attracting global attention with stunning landscapes, rich history, and growing business opportunities.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: Uganda hopes to position itself as a key avocado supplier across international markets. Ciel Group's strategy for growth across the textile, agriculture, finance and healthcare industries.

programme.desc: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

programme.desc: Coy Wire reports on all of the action in Paris at the 126th edition of the Roland-Garros.

programme.title: Good Night, and Good Luck: Pre Show
programme.desc: Previewing CNN's historic broadcast of `Good Night, and Good Luck' live on Broadway.

programme.title: Good Night, and Good Luck
programme.desc: In a landmark Broadway theatrical event, Oscar-winner George Clooney portrays journalist Edward R. Murrow and his history-altering, on-air showdown with Senator Joseph McCarthy live on stage from the Winter Garden Theatre.

programme.title: Janie Jones
programme.desc: A young girl who has been abandoned by her former-groupie mother informs a fading rock star that she is his daughter.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Prozac Nation
programme.desc: A talented young writer struggles with self-destructive behavior and paralyzing depression during her first year at Harvard. Featuring an all-star cast including Christina Ricci, Anne Heche and Michelle Williams.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: Then She Found Me
programme.desc: April's (Helen Hunt) life is spinning out of control when a talk show host claims to be her biological mother.

programme.title: Bright Star
programme.desc: "Bright Star" portrays the romance between 19th-century poet John Keats (Ben Whishaw) and Fanny Brawne.

programme.title: Half of a Yellow Sun
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel, Oscar nominee Chiwetel Ejiofor ("12 Years a Slave") stars in this story of two sisters caught up in the events of the Nigerian civil war.

programme.title: Mid90s
programme.desc: Written and directed by Jonah Hill, Mid90s follows Stevie, a thirteen-year-old in 90s-era LA who spends his summer navigating between his troubled home life and a group of new friends that he meets at a Motor Avenue skate shop.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: Davis seemingly has the perfect life until a tragic car accident leaves him struggling to cope with the loss of his wife.

programme.title: 21 Bridges
programme.desc: 21 Bridges follows an embattled NYPD detective (Chadwick Boseman), who is thrust into a citywide manhunt after uncovering a massive and unexpected conspiracy, where all 21 Bridges are closed to prevent any entry or exit from the iconic island.

programme.title: Alien Hunter
programme.desc: In this sci-fi thriller, extraterrestrial and cryptology expert Julien Rome (Emmy winner James Spader) is brought in to investigate a mysterious alien object in Antarctica.

programme.title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: An agent newly retired from the CIA (Scott Glenn) agrees to become an Italian businessman's bodyguard in this adventure film. Things fall apart though, when terrorists kidnap the Italian's daughter and the agent must rescue her.

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When one of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircraft crashes in the sea near Malta, the CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the plane's advanced weapons system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme is Lyon Gaultier, a deserter in the French Foreign Legion who travels to the USA and enters the gory world of bare-knuckled street fighting in order to make money to save his brother's life and family.

programme.title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: An agent newly retired from the CIA (Scott Glenn) agrees to become an Italian businessman's bodyguard in this adventure film. Things fall apart though, when terrorists kidnap the Italian's daughter and the agent must rescue her.

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When one of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircraft crashes in the sea near Malta, the CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the plane's advanced weapons system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme is Lyon Gaultier, a deserter in the French Foreign Legion who travels to the USA and enters the gory world of bare-knuckled street fighting in order to make money to save his brother's life and family.

programme.title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: An agent newly retired from the CIA (Scott Glenn) agrees to become an Italian businessman's bodyguard in this adventure film. Things fall apart though, when terrorists kidnap the Italian's daughter and the agent must rescue her.

programme.title: Pawn Shop Chronicles
programme.desc: An anthology of stories involving meth addicted white supremacists, a man looking for his kidnapped wife and an Elvis impersonator.

programme.title: Afternoon Delight
programme.desc: Rachel tries to spice up her marriage with a trip to a strip club. She befriends McKenna, who gave her a lapdance. McKenna moves in with Rachel's family and becomes a nanny for the son.

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: Annoyed over her boyfriend's obsession with a musician, Annie writes a negative comment on a blog. However, Annie's life takes an unusual turn when the musician reaches out to her.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: The split-second moments that can take a life down one path instead of another form the tantalizing 'what if?' in this delightful romantic comedy starring Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: Annoyed over her boyfriend's obsession with a musician, Annie writes a negative comment on a blog. However, Annie's life takes an unusual turn when the musician reaches out to her.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: A young Greek woman falls in love with a non-Greek and struggles to get her family to accept him while she comes to terms with her heritage and cultural identity.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: The split-second moments that can take a life down one path instead of another form the tantalizing 'what if?' in this delightful romantic comedy starring Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: Annoyed over her boyfriend's obsession with a musician, Annie writes a negative comment on a blog. However, Annie's life takes an unusual turn when the musician reaches out to her.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: A young Greek woman falls in love with a non-Greek and struggles to get her family to accept him while she comes to terms with her heritage and cultural identity.

programme.title: The Vows we Keep
programme.desc: An event planner must organize the perfect wedding for her sister in less than a month when she finds out the Rosewood, a historic inn and beloved wedding venue, is being sold.

programme.title: All of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer’s life suddenly changes course when she inherits a country home and learns she must share it with a career-obsessed Wall Street trader. At first, these opposites do not attract...

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren dreams of opening an art gallery while dealing with her mixed emotions about her husband. She recruits The Love Club to help her move on, but instead they come up with a plan to keep them together.

programme.title: Royal Nanny
programme.desc: MI5 agent Claire goes undercover as the royal nanny, and must overcome the challenges of her assignment, like resisting the charms of Prince Colin while keeping the family safe at Christmas.

programme.title: Love Under the Olive Tree
programme.desc: The prize of Sunset Valley's annual olive oil contest is a land parcel with disputed ownership. When feisty Nicole and competitive Jake face-off, they never expect sparks to fly.

programme.title: Yellowstone Romance
programme.desc: When Olivia’s BFF gets engaged and says she’s moving to a ranch in Wyoming, Olivia makes a last ditch effort to show Amber what a mistake the move is and arranges a bachelorette getaway to a working dude ranch.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: A corporate executive is sent to a small town to re-brand a restaurant as part of a strategic acquisition, but the iconic diner happens to be in her home town where she hasn't been in years.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Romance in Style
programme.desc: Ella's unique designs inspire publishing mogul Derek to include plus-sized fashion in his magazine. Soon, Derek begins to realize that Ella's influence reaches far beyond the catwalk.

programme.title: Love on Fire
programme.desc: Gia Summers is ready to start again with a promising new job, a new lakeside neighborhood, and a brand new home! After moving in, Gia soon forms an unexpected friendship with her next door neighbor...

programme.title: Christmas on My Mind
programme.desc: When Lucy wakes up with a wedding dress in hand, she believes that she is late to her wedding with her ex-boyfriend Zac. However, she has no recollection of the past 2 years.

programme.title: The Mistletoe Inn
programme.desc: Kim Ross, an aspiring romance novelist, finds herself unceremoniously dumped by her soon-to-be-published romance novelist boyfriend, Garth. She decides to take a leap and signs up for a romance writing retreat.

programme.title: Must Love Christmas
programme.desc: Known for her Christmas-themed stories, a renowned romance novelist finds herself snowbound in the charming town of Cranberry Falls. She soon finds herself in an unexpected love triangle with her childhood crush and a determined reporter.

programme.title: The Santa Stakeout
programme.desc: Tanya is a police detective who is reluctantly partnered with fellow detective Ryan to solve a recent string of heists taking place during high-profile holiday parties around town. They go undercover as newlyweds...

programme.title: The Most Colorful time of the Year
programme.desc: Ryan is a elementary school teacher, who learns that he is colorblind. Michelle, an optometrist and mother of one of his students, helps bring color into his life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: The Tree That Saved Christmas
programme.desc: Molly Logan needs a miracle to save her parents' Christmas tree farm from foreclosure. The answer may lie in the sapling Molly rescued as a child.

programme.title: Record Breaking Christmas
programme.desc: Leah is forced to travel to a small town to investigate its plans to break multiple holiday world records. Later, she discovers that she may be the person who can help them reach their true Christmas goal.

programme.title: Mistletoe & Menorahs
programme.desc: When a toy company executive must learn about Hanukkah to land a big account, she enlists the help of her co-worker's friend, who also happens to be in need of turning his pad into a Christmas Wonderland.

programme.title: The Rooftop Christmas Tree
programme.desc: It's Christmas and once again, Dale places a tree on his roof and ends up in court. No one in the small town knows why he continues the practice, but an idealistic attorney, is determined to keep him out of jail.

programme.title: Debbie Macomber's A Mrs. Miracle Christmas
programme.desc: When a family faces loneliness and loss of faith, Mrs. Miracle swoops in to renew their Christmas Spirit, and they experience a holiday of heavenly proportions.

programme.title: Christmas Festival of Ice
programme.desc: When Emma finds out that her beloved ice-sculpting contest, part of her hometown's Christmas festival, has been canceled, she springs into action.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A couple investigate the cultural similarities between two London districts, seven miles apart; schoolboys' extracurricular activities are examined; a TV farming club comments on Tchaikovsky.
programme.sub-title: Mr. And Mrs. Brian Norris' Ford Popular

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: "The Money Program" features a Swiss banker, a city accountant and a song of praise.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A program called "Blood, Devastation, Death, War and Horror," featuring a man who speaks exclusively in anagrams; a timorous TV announcer, before and after he undergoes psychiatric treatment; the employment of "pantomime horses."
programme.sub-title: Blood, Devastation, Death, War And Horror

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Contestants in "The All-England Summarize Proust Competition" are judged in swimsuit and evening-gown categories; an irate customer confronts his travel agent. Also: an expedition to Mount Everest, made by an international group of hairstylists.

programme.title: Monty Python: Before The Flying Circus
programme.desc: Before Monty Python, before the Flying Circus, before America, the Hollywood Bowl and the hordes of fans, there were just six young men who came together with an idea for a show – a show that would transform their lives and change comedy forever.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: CBC in Antarctica
programme.desc: Susan Ormiston offers the full story of 2025's historic Canadian expedition aboard the HMCS Margaret Brooke.

programme.title: This Week's Top Stories
programme.desc: Making sense of the big stories that made news across Canada and around the world from this past week.

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Canada's consumer watchdog series since 1972, this news program uncovers wrongdoings in the marketplace. With the help of hidden cameras, correspondents dish out the dirt on not so "clean" business practices. Once they get the evidence they need on tape, they apply pressure on businesses to change policies vis-a-vis the products and services they provide to the public.
